service_list.name: Roof Repairs
service_list.brief: Repairs for storm damage, sagging, leaks, pooling water, loose or missing shingles, and cracked or broken tiles.

service_list.name: Roof Leak Repairs
service_list.brief: Leak repair service promoted for damaged roofs and gutters where water ingress may cause structural damage.

service_list.name: Metal Roof Repair
service_list.brief: Metal roof repair is listed as a roofing service offered by the business.

service_list.name: Whirlybird Installation
service_list.brief: Supply and installation of whirlybirds to move hot air out of roof cavities and improve home cooling.

service_list.name: Roof Painters
service_list.brief: Roof painting services including colour updates, repainting, pressure cleaning, and assessment before painting.

service_list.name: Gutter Repairs
service_list.brief: Gutter repair services including gutter cleaning, painting, replacement, gutter guard, and clearing blocked gutters.

service_list.name: Roof Inspection
service_list.brief: Roof inspections and reports to identify wear, leaks, unsafe features, repair needs, and remaining roof lifespan.

service_list.name: Tiled Roof Repairs
service_list.brief: Tiled roof repair and restoration including replacement of broken tiles, valley seal installation, pressure cleaning, and re-cementing capping.

service_list.name: Roof Replacements
service_list.brief: Roof replacements are explicitly promoted on the homepage as part of the business's roofing services.

service_list.name: Roof Restorations
service_list.brief: Roof restoration services are promoted for Brisbane homes and commercial properties.

key_messaging: Genuine roof inspection and quote onsite
Adding value to homes and commercial properties for over 10 years
Reliable tradesmen who are on time and care about results

items.description: Find and repair roof leaks quickly to reduce water damage, mould risk, and ongoing ceiling or wall repairs.

items.description: Install quality whirlybirds to remove hot air from the roof cavity and help keep Queensland homes cooler.

brief.redesign_brief: Keep the strong local SEO footprint, phone-first contact path, Brisbane service-area pages, free onsite quote message, QBCC licence detail, and broad roofing service coverage. Improve the generic placeholder logo/assets, duplicated page sections, weak button labels, visible content errors, inconsistent business naming, and trust presentation so homeowners immediately understand who will do the work, what is licensed, and how to book. This redesign matters because roof repair is high-urgency and trust-sensitive: clearer service pathways, stronger proof, better mobile CTAs, and cleaner copy should increase quote enquiries while reducing hesitation around licensing, workmanship, and response reliability.

ready_to_build_concerns: Logo appears to be a placeholder image rather than a finished brand asset.
No email address found in the crawl.
No owner name, team members, or real testimonials found in the scraped content.
Some service pages contain placeholder or incorrect CTA text such as 'Button' and '0000000'.
Business naming varies between The Brisbane Roof Repairers, Brisbane Roof Repairers, The Roof Repairers, and Brisbane Roofing Solutions.
Disclaimer says the website brand cannot perform building work valued in excess of $0, which needs clarification before publishing a trust-focused redesign.
Several high-value pages linked in navigation were not included in the 10-page scrape, including Roof Leak Repairs and Metal Roof Repairs.
